overall.description: Post-apocalyptic game footage from Fallout 4 showing a first-person walk along a ruined waterfront street at dusk. The camera moves past a retro-futuristic abandoned vehicle toward a derelict diner structure, with the Nuka-World tower visible in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined waterfront street with abandoned retro-futuristic vehicle

events.description: camera passes close to the rear of the abandoned vehicle, temporarily blocking the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cracked asphalt road toward the abandoned orange and black vehicle ahead

entered.detail: abandoned orange and black retro-futuristic vehicle with rounded design blocking the path ahead
large vertical billboard with red and white branding on the left side of the street
black ornate street lamp with curved design along the right side of the road
derelict brick and metal warehouse structures with broken windows and debris
tall distinctive tower structure visible across the water in the distance
body of water visible to the right with distant shoreline structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a post-apocalyptic waterfront street at dusk, with the camera walking toward an abandoned retro-futuristic bus blocking the road. To the left, a Nuka-Cola billboard stands above ruined warehouses, while the distinctive Nuka-World tower rises in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street section approaching ruined diner

events.description: camera passes the abandoned vehicle and continues forward down the open street
ruined diner structure with canopy becomes more prominent in the center of the frame

agents.ego_description: moving past the abandoned vehicle and proceeding down the cracked road toward the waterfront structure ahead

notable_agents.action: small spherical robot or rolling object moving along the road surface ahead of the camera

entered.detail: derelict diner structure with large overhanging roof and broken windows situated near the waterfront
red sandbag fortifications piled near the diner entrance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the abandoned bus, the camera continues down the open street toward a ruined diner structure near the water. A small spherical object rolls along the road ahead, while sandbag barricades become visible near the approaching building.

scene_state.functional_zone: immediate vicinity of ruined waterfront diner

events.description: camera moves from open street into the immediate area of the ruined diner structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the derelict diner structure and examining the waterfront ruins up close

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the ruined diner structure closely, revealing details of the decayed canopy and sandbag barricades. The waterfront is now immediately to the right, with the observation tower visible across the bay as the camera explores the derelict building's perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a ruined waterfront street at dusk that leads from a blocked roadway toward a derelict diner. It begins by moving toward an abandoned retro-futuristic bus, passing a Nuka-Cola billboard and ruined warehouses while the Nuka-World tower looms in the distance across the water. As the camera clears the vehicle, the path opens up toward a ruined diner structure where a small spherical object rolls across the road and sandbag barricades emerge from the gloom. The scene then shifts closer to the building, revealing the decayed canopy and the immediate proximity of the waterfront to the right. Finally, the camera explores the perimeter of the derelict diner with the observation tower remaining visible across the bay.
